acceptance_criteria: CI pipeline runs static checks, unit tests, and integration tests for web-app critical flows against mocked and/or local backend contracts.
End-to-end smoke suite validates login/context load, requirement operations, task/workflow actions, and run telemetry rendering.
Frontend build artifacts include version metadata tied to git commit for traceability.
Release checklist defines rollback strategy, compatibility checks versus server API versions, and post-deploy verification steps.
Regression criteria are documented for every new route/action before feature completion is accepted.
description: Create robust quality gates and release process for the React app so changes are reliable, observable, and safe to deploy with backend evolution.
title: Establish testing and release discipline for web GUI
